headline: No reason for investors to change their tune on software yet, says Brent Thill
summary: Jefferies' Brent Thill says the rotation out of software stocks is still continuing as the sector faces 10 Walls of Worry, and that when investors do return they will be extremely selective. He also says that within the sector, he likes infrastructure software companies and cybersecurity companies, but applications would be the last to come back.

headline: Suze Orman Says Put 50% in VOO. Here’s Why She’s Right

headline: MAINGEAR Unveils the All-New MG-1: A Total Redesign of Its Most Awarded Gaming PC Ever
summary: MAINGEAR, the leader in premium-quality, high-performance gaming PCs, today unveiled the next-generation MG-1, a total redesign of the original – MAINGEAR's most acclaimed gaming desktop ever. Tom's Hardware Editor's Choice. TechRadar Editor's Choice. IDA Design Awards Gold Winner 2025. Forbes called the original "Immaculate Construction, Incredible Performance." The new MG-1 wasn't built to fix problems. It was built to raise the ceiling on something that was already best-in-class.
